Paying for College.title: Your success is our priority.
Paying for College.summary: Connect with an advisor and register for classes before break.

Paying for College.title: Current Students
Paying for College.summary: We're happy you're here. As part of the FVCC family, you now have access to a ton of resources and a team of faculty and staff eager to help you make the most of your college experience. We can't wait to see you on campus.

Paying for College.title: Parents & Visitors
Paying for College.summary: The return on investment at FVCC is tremendous. With low tuition and fees, students can quickly enter the workforce or transfer to any institution across the country.

Paying for College.title: Prospective Students
Paying for College.summary: At Flathead Valley Community College, excellence is affordable. We’re a diverse community of enthusiastic learners, high-level researchers, student-focused staff and outstanding faculty. Our student support services are here to help you every step of the way, because your success is our success.

Safety & Policies.summary: We're happy you're here. As part of the FVCC family, you now have access to a ton of resources and a team of faculty and staff eager to help you make the most of your college experience. We can't wait to see you on campus.

Graduation.title: Parents & Visitors
Graduation.summary: The return on investment at FVCC is tremendous. With low tuition and fees, students can quickly enter the workforce or transfer to any institution across the country.
